description:
I believe this is the same female present in the same part of this milkvetch patch Tuesday and Wednesday. Note that she is laying eggs, as seen in the primary photo.

Male butterflies were present last week, but may not have survived the cold and rain of last weekend. I only hope this female is laying fertilized eggs.

These PV blues are all progeny of the wild butterflies using the milkvetch last year, not releases, and presumably not ones raised on the deerweed that is elsewhere in the Alta Vicente Preserve.
